texto: If I could change the attitude of young men toward literature, I would want them to read not just for escape, but because literature can be more truthful about things like sex, commitment, and aging. It can be more truthful about the stuff that our parents lied to us (and themselves) about, and the stuff that everyone has to lie about. It can all be dealt with truthfully in fiction and poetry.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lorin Stein: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “If I could change the attitude of young men toward literature, I would want them to read not just…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, literature, reading pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e reading.

texto: I’m a reader who uses fiction as a way of worrying about life.
explicacao: Citação de Lorin Stein sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I’m a reader who uses fiction as a way of worrying about life.” articula reflexao, fiction, reading em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reading.
